svg.text: ① On-brand by default — a brand-voice system makes agent-speed output genuinely on-brand.
② Reviewed — human approval on every publish; no auto-publishing of unreviewed content.
③ Production, not placement — agency1 makes creative; Claude products are ad-free (no paid slots).
④ High-volume — the factory turns one asset into many channels, formats & markets.
⑤ Claude-native — model tiering + brand-as-configuration; Claude Design for the visual.
⑥ Graduates to a product — the brand system & factory become market1; closes the loop with customer1.
